There are two end game mode: 1) Phantasmal dive and 2) Regional d-effect Zone. Many of the characters in permanent banner are not strong enough for late game.
For Phantasmal dive:
Caecus, Winkle, Leign are still viable in T0 team.
Goliath, Karen, Sanga, Pandia, Celeste are good choices also.

For Reginal d-effect Zone:
Faint is still viable in T0 team.
Winkle, Leign, Goliath are good choices. 

But you would need a complete team for them to work. Maybe check out the investigation rankings on both game mode..
E2 is enough to consider making him a "main DPS" cause you really want that preparation 1 and increased crit rate for his 2 cost card
E3 makes it consistent enough to be used multiple times though cause the added furnace generation is good
so worth it to making him a dps

Even though I have him at E3, I wouldn't use him as the only source of DPS. His 2 cost can basically delete mob encounters (with some blood furnace), but realistically can only be used for big damage at most 3 times in a boss fight (usually twice if not using Thais to dupe his 2 cost).

And that doesn't cut it when bosses have multiple phases and can tank a max furnace crit 2 cost card easily (does about 1/3 hp for most late game bosses). I use the big damage if I need to clear mobs with boss (common in later chapters) and/or to finish them off since it is a big burst
I somehow got 3 Death Resistances in a row earlier. I ended the fight at 7%.

whats giant blade

It's the left most blue wheel in the picture. When you get +12 (16 total copies) of a SSR wheel, you can equip another SSR wheel for the same awaker. Recommended cause it's a big DPS boost for most carries.
As a sole SSR wheel, it's still decent and versatile, but most DPS awakers benefit from other wheels better (usually their signature wheels)

For main story you want your 4 awakers to be the strongest. Pulling for more awakers doesn't make it stronger once your team is fixed so the best thing are wheels
